task_completion.description: Thunderbird application is open and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Mozilla Thunderbird email client window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A new folder named 'Important' is created under 'Local Folders'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left sidebar (folder pane) of Thunderbird, there is a folder explicitly named 'Important' nested under the 'Local Folders' account.

task_completion.description: Emails are selected in the Inbox to be moved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Multiple emails are highlighted in the Inbox message list, or a drag-and-drop action of emails from the Inbox to the 'Important' folder is visible.

task_completion.description: The 'Important' folder is selected to display its contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Important' folder under 'Local Folders' is highlighted/selected in the left sidebar, and its contents are displayed in the main message list pane.

task_completion.description: At least three emails are present inside the 'Important' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: While the 'Important' folder is selected, the main message list pane shows at least three distinct email messages.

integrity.description: The agent used the Thunderbird graphical user interface rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'mkdir', 'mv', or 'cp' being used to manipulate Thunderbird's underlying maildir/mbox files directly.

integrity.description: The folder was created inside the Thunderbird application, not a system file manager.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Important' folder appears within the Thunderbird folder pane, not in a separate file explorer window (like Nautilus or Thunar).

integrity.description: The items moved are genuine emails from the Inbox.
integrity.visual_evidence: The items in the 'Important' folder look like standard emails with subjects, senders, and dates, rather than manually created dummy text files or drafts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected folder name must be exactly 'Important' and it must be located under 'Local Folders'. The agent must successfully move a minimum of 3 emails into this folder.
